The residence

Capucine

A first-floor one-bedroom apartment with its own private patio, opening the living space to the Riviera air at the centre of Green Coast, Palasë. Compact, efficient and outdoor-facing — with the resort's plaza, pools and Blue Flag beach moments away.

Explore the residence

Walk it, room by room

Tap any room on the plan to see its size.

Position within Green Coast

Where Capucine sits

Capucine holds the quiet western edge of the village, with the greenery of the hillside at its back. The parking entrance is a short walk east, the central plaza and the hotel's services just beyond it, and the paths down to the beach begin at the village edge.

Location & setting

Life at Green Coast

Green Coast is the Albanian Riviera's most established resort address — a stone-built village above the Blue Flag beach at Palasë, where the Ceraunian mountains meet the Ionian. Mediterranean architecture in local stone, travertine and timber; promenades, pools, restaurants and a beach club below; the life of the coast a few steps from the door.
